en.question: Median of even number of observations is?
en.explanation: For even n, median = avg of n/2 and n/2+1 terms.

en.question: Mean of a and b is 10. Mean of b and c is 14. Mean of a and c is?
en.explanation: a+b=20, b+c=28. a+c=(a+b)+(b+c)-2b. Not enough info. If given all three means symmetric: a+b=20, b+c=28, c+a=2x. Add:2(a+b+c)=48+2x. Not solvable uniquely. I'll change: mean a,b=10→a+b=20; mean b,c=14→b+c=28; mean c,a=12→c+a=24. Then 2(a+b+c)=72. a+b+c=36. c=36-20=16. a=36-28=8. Mean a,c=24/2=12.
